name: dynamic year param
description: Test case for dynamic year param
expected_query: with "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" on "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by player.fname, player.lname, "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."rec_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
